hero.css: .hero_001 { position: relative; min-height: 100svh; overflow: hidden; isolation: isolate; display: flex; align-items: stretch; color: #fff7e8; background: radial-gradient(circle at 82% 12%, rgba(255, 211, 126, 0.34) 0 9%, transparent 27%), radial-gradient(circle at 10% 88%, rgba(255, 121, 101, 0.24) 0 10%, transparent 32%), linear-gradient(135deg, #24122b 0%, #4a1835 38%, #7b2d36 68%, #d28552 118%); font-family: Manrope, sans-serif; } .hero_001::before { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: -2; opacity: 0.55; background-image: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.06) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.045) 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 72px 72px; mask-image: linear-gradient(120deg, transparent 0%, #000 20%, #000 78%, transparent 100%); } .hero_001::after { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: auto -14% -26% -14%; height: 52%; z-index: -1; background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, rgba(255, 216, 147, 0.28), transparent 68%); filter: blur(10px); } .hero_001 .hero_001__wrap { width: min(1440px, 100%); margin: 0 auto; min-height: 100svh; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.02fr 0.98fr; gap: clamp(24px, 4vw, 70px); align-items: center; padding: clamp(28px, 5vw, 76px); position: relative; } .hero_001 .hero_001__content { position: relative; z-index: 3; max-width: 720px; padding-top: 18px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__eyebrow { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 10px 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 225, 169, 0.34); border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(40, 15, 35, 0.38); box-shadow: 0 18px 60px rgba(26, 7, 25, 0.25); backdrop-filter: blur(18px); color: #ffe1a9; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 700; } .hero_001 .hero_001__eyebrow-mark { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: #ffd986; box-shadow: 0 0 0 6px rgba(255, 217, 134, 0.13), 0 0 34px rgba(255, 217, 134, 0.8); } .hero_001 .hero_001__gujarati { margin: 30px 0 4px; font-family: 'Noto Serif Gujarati', serif; color: #ffd68d; font-size: clamp(18px, 2vw, 26px); letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-shadow: 0 8px 34px rgba(0,0,0,0.28); } .hero_001 .hero_001__names { margin: 0; font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', 'Playfair Display', serif; font-weight: 600; line-height: 0.86; letter-spacing: -0.055em; font-size: clamp(76px, 12vw, 164px); color: #fff5dc; text-shadow: 0 20px 72px rgba(31, 8, 29, 0.56); } .hero_001 .hero_001__amp { display: inline-block; margin: 0 0.03em; color: #f6c16e; font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-style: italic; font-weight: 500; transform: translateY(-0.04em); } .hero_001 .hero_001__message { margin: clamp(24px, 3vw, 36px) 0 0; max-width: 640px; color: rgba(255, 247, 232, 0.86); font-size: clamp(16px, 1.35vw, 19px); line-height: 1.85; } .hero_001 .hero_001__actions { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; gap: 16px; margin-top: clamp(28px, 4vw, 46px); } .hero_001 .hero_001__date { display: grid; grid-template-columns: auto 1px auto; align-items: center; gap: 16px; padding: 15px 20px; border-radius: 18px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 218, 151, 0.34); background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.16), rgba(255,255,255,0.06)); box-shadow: 0 24px 80px rgba(27, 8, 24, 0.34); backdrop-filter: blur(18px); } .hero_001 .hero_001__date-main { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: clamp(28px, 3vw, 42px); color: #ffe0a3; line-height: 1; } .hero_001 .hero_001__date-line { width: 1px; height: 42px; background: rgba(255, 225, 169, 0.36); } .hero_001 .hero_001__date-sub { color: rgba(255, 247, 232, 0.78); font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.35; letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 700; } .hero_001 .hero_001__venue { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 3px; color: rgba(255, 247, 232, 0.88); font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.4; } .hero_001 .hero_001__venue strong { color: #fff5dc; font-size: 15px; letter-spacing: 0.03em; } .hero_001 .hero_001__visual { position: relative; min-height: 700px; display: grid; place-items: center; } .hero_001 .hero_001__glow { position: absolute; width: min(620px, 90%); aspect-ratio: 1; border-radius: 50%; background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255, 222, 160, 0.34), rgba(255, 145, 98, 0.14) 43%, transparent 68%); filter: blur(12px); animation: hero_001_breathe 7s ease-in-out infinite; } .hero_001 .hero_001__palace { position: relative; width: min(520px, 88vw); height: 650px; border-radius: 260px 260px 42px 42px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 226, 172, 0.36); background: linear-gradient(150deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18), rgba(255, 244, 218, 0.08) 44%, rgba(87, 25, 54, 0.18)); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.28), 0 34px 120px rgba(22, 7, 25, 0.55); backdrop-filter: blur(22px); overflow: hidden; } .hero_001 .hero_001__palace::before { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 28px 30px 34px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 223, 164, 0.28); border-radius: 240px 240px 30px 30px; background: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 17%, rgba(255, 224, 164, 0.24), transparent 22%), linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(59, 18, 54, 0.04), rgba(59, 18, 54, 0.4)); } .hero_001 .hero_001__palace::after { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0; background-image: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, rgba(255, 228, 176, 0.34) 0 2px, transparent 3px), radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, transparent 0 27px, rgba(255, 228, 176, 0.12) 28px 29px, transparent 31px), conic-gradient(from 45deg, transparent 0 22deg, rgba(255, 228, 176, 0.12) 23deg 24deg, transparent 25deg 67deg, rgba(255, 228, 176, 0.12) 68deg 69deg, transparent 70deg 100%); background-size: 88px 88px, 88px 88px, 88px 88px; opacity: 0.5; mask-image: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, #000 0 46%, transparent 75%); } .hero_001 .hero_001__dome { position: absolute; top: 56px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); width: 210px; height: 118px; border-radius: 118px 118px 16px 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 226, 172, 0.38); background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 215, 139, 0.28), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.07)); box-shadow: 0 22px 60px rgba(31, 8, 29, 0.24); } .hero_001 .hero_001__dome::before { content: ""; position: absolute; top: -34px; left: 50%; width: 2px; height: 44px; transform: translateX(-50%); background: linear-gradient(#ffe0a3, transparent); } .hero_001 .hero_001__dome::after { content: ""; position: absolute; top: -42px; left: 50%; width: 18px; height: 18px; transform: translateX(-50%) rotate(45deg); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 226, 172, 0.55); background: rgba(255, 213, 136, 0.24); } .hero_001 .hero_001__toran { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 8%; right: 8%; height: 96px; z-index: 3; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; padding-top: 16px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__toran span { width: 18px; height: 48px; border-radius: 50% 50% 45% 45%; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffc15f, #f47e55 70%, #b93b4f); box-shadow: 0 0 28px rgba(255, 188, 95, 0.35); transform-origin: top center; animation: hero_001_sway 4.8s ease-in-out infinite; } .hero_001 .hero_001__toran span:nth-child(even) { height: 38px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffe3a9, #f0a84d 72%, #b64548); animation-delay: -1.6s; } .hero_001 .hero_001__toran span:nth-child(3n) { animation-delay: -2.4s; } .hero_001 .hero_001__center { position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -40%); width: 310px; aspect-ratio: 1; border-radius: 50%; display: grid; place-items: center; background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255, 245, 220, 0.16), rgba(255, 212, 142, 0.06) 48%, transparent 70%); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 226, 172, 0.22); box-shadow: inset 0 0 52px rgba(255, 214, 141, 0.08); } .hero_001 .hero_001__center::before { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 18px; border-radius: 50%; border: 1px dashed rgba(255, 226, 172, 0.38); animation: hero_001_turn 28s linear infinite; } .hero_001 .hero_001__center::after { content: "K  •  M"; position: absolute; inset: 58px; border-radius: 50%; display: grid; place-items: center; font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 42px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; color: #ffe1a9; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 226, 172, 0.25); background: rgba(48, 15, 45, 0.22); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); } .hero_001 .hero_001__pillars { position: absolute; left: 58px; right: 58px; bottom: 64px; height: 260px; display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr); gap: 20px; align-items: end; } .hero_001 .hero_001__pillar { height: 100%; border-radius: 28px 28px 10px 10px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 226, 172, 0.24); background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.05), rgba(255, 224, 166, 0.14), rgba(255,255,255,0.04)); box-shadow: inset 0 18px 22px rgba(255, 235, 190, 0.04); } .hero_001 .hero_001__pillar:nth-child(2), .hero_001 .hero_001__pillar:nth-child(4) { height: 82%; opacity: 0.84; } .hero_001 .hero_001__steps { position: absolute; left: 64px; right: 64px; bottom: 34px; display: grid; gap: 8px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__steps span { height: 10px; border-radius: 999px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255, 226, 172, 0.34), transparent); } .hero_001 .hero_001__badge { position: absolute; right: 0; bottom: 76px; z-index: 5; width: 188px; padding: 20px 18px; border-radius: 28px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 226, 172, 0.34); background: rgba(50, 15, 44, 0.5); box-shadow: 0 26px 90px rgba(18, 4, 19, 0.45); backdrop-filter: blur(18px); color: rgba(255, 247, 232, 0.82); } .hero_001 .hero_001__badge-top { display: block; font-family: 'Noto Serif Gujarati', serif; color: #ffd990; font-size: 20px; margin-bottom: 8px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__badge-main { display: block; font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; color: #fff5dc; font-size: 28px; line-height: 1.02; } .hero_001 .hero_001__floating { position: absolute; left: -18px; top: 20%; width: 118px; aspect-ratio: 1; border-radius: 34px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 226, 172, 0.25); background: conic-gradient(from 0deg, rgba(255, 221, 151, 0.05), rgba(255, 221, 151, 0.42), rgba(255, 121, 101, 0.14), rgba(255, 221, 151, 0.05)); box-shadow: 0 24px 80px rgba(24, 7, 24, 0.32); transform: rotate(18deg); opacity: 0.9; } .hero_001 .hero_001__floating::before { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 18px; border-radius: 28px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 246, 221, 0.34); } .hero_001 .hero_001__scroll { position: absolute; left: clamp(28px, 5vw, 76px); bottom: 28px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; color: rgba(255, 247, 232, 0.54); font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; } .hero_001 .hero_001__scroll-line { width: 54px; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #ffd990, transparent); } @keyframes hero_001_breathe { 0%, 100% { transform: scale(0.96); opacity: 0.76; } 50% { transform: scale(1.06); opacity: 1; } } @keyframes hero_001_sway { 0%, 100% { transform: rotate(-4deg); } 50% { transform: rotate(5deg); } } @keyframes hero_001_turn { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } } @media (max-width: 900px) { .hero_001 .hero_001__wrap { grid-template-columns: 1fr; padding: 34px 28px 86px; gap: 18px; align-items: start; } .hero_001 .hero_001__content { max-width: 100%; padding-top: 10px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__names { font-size: clamp(72px, 17vw, 132px); max-width: 760px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__message { max-width: 760px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__visual { min-height: 520px; margin-top: -4px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__palace { width: min(500px, 94vw); height: 500px; border-radius: 230px 230px 34px 34px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__dome { top: 44px; width: 174px; height: 96px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__center { width: 250px; transform: translate(-50%, -38%); } .hero_001 .hero_001__center::after { inset: 48px; font-size: 34px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__pillars { left: 46px; right: 46px; bottom: 54px; height: 190px; gap: 14px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__badge { right: calc(50% - 250px); bottom: 44px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__floating { left: calc(50% - 270px); top: 13%; width: 96px; } } @media (max-width: 640px) { .hero_001 { min-height: 100svh; } .hero_001 .hero_001__wrap { padding: 24px 18px 76px; gap: 8px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__eyebrow { font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.16em; padding: 9px 12px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__gujarati { margin-top: 22px; font-size: 17px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__names { font-size: clamp(58px, 20vw, 92px); line-height: 0.9; letter-spacing: -0.04em; } .hero_001 .hero_001__message { font-size: 14.5px; line-height: 1.68; margin-top: 20px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__actions { margin-top: 24px; gap: 12px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__date { width: 100%; grid-template-columns: auto 1px 1fr; padding: 13px 14px; gap: 12px; border-radius: 16px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__date-main { font-size: 30px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__venue { width: 100%; padding-left: 2px; font-size: 13px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__visual { min-height: 390px; margin-top: 8px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__palace { width: min(360px, 96vw); height: 372px; border-radius: 180px 180px 26px 26px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__palace::before { inset: 20px 20px 24px; border-radius: 170px 170px 22px 22px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__toran { left: 9%; right: 9%; height: 70px; padding-top: 12px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__toran span { width: 13px; height: 34px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__toran span:nth-child(even) { height: 28px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__dome { top: 34px; width: 130px; height: 74px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__center { width: 188px; transform: translate(-50%, -36%); } .hero_001 .hero_001__center::before { inset: 13px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__center::after { inset: 37px; font-size: 25px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; } .hero_001 .hero_001__pillars { left: 34px; right: 34px; bottom: 42px; height: 132px; gap: 9px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__pillar { border-radius: 18px 18px 8px 8px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__steps { left: 40px; right: 40px; bottom: 24px; gap: 6px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__steps span { height: 7px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__badge { width: 142px; right: 12px; bottom: 26px; padding: 14px 13px; border-radius: 20px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__badge-top { font-size: 16px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__badge-main { font-size: 21px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__floating { width: 70px; left: 4px; top: 18%; border-radius: 22px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__floating::before { inset: 12px; border-radius: 18px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__scroll { left: 18px; bottom: 18px; font-size: 10px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__scroll-line { width: 36px; } }
hero.designNotes: A romantic royal-palace Gujarati hero using jewel-toned gradients, glassmorphism, a custom arched palace illustration, toran-inspired florals, subtle rangoli geometry, and bilingual English/Gujarati typography for a premium first-screen wedding experience.
hero.html:
Gujarati Wedding Celebration
શુભ લગ્ન • કાવ્યા અને મિહિર

Kavya &
Mihir

With blessings of Shri Ganesh and our families, we invite you to celebrate a joyful Gujarati wedding filled with mehendi, garba, baraat, sacred pheras, dinner, music, and love.

22March
2026
Akshar Grand PalaceSomerset, New Jersey
પ્રેમRoyal
Palace
Celebrate with us
